description: RAG-ready text chunks from three financial-fraud datasets.

sources.source_name: FTC Consumer Sentinel Network Data Book 2024
sources.notes: Aggregated consumer fraud report data. Raw CSV files downloadable at https://www.ftc.gov/system/files/ftc_gov/data/csn-data-book-2024-csv.zip

sources.source_name: FTC Explore Data — Interactive Sentinel Dashboards
sources.notes: Landing page and methodology for the FTC's Tableau-based interactive dashboards. Data updated quarterly.

sources.source_name: CSI Iowa: The Impact of Financial Fraud in Iowa (August 2025)
sources.notes: Full-text extraction from PDF report. Covers Iowa-specific fraud statistics, demographics, economic impact modelling.

schema.source_url: Canonical URL of the source document
schema.section: Sub-section heading within the source document
schema.topic_tags: List of topical keyword tags for filtering/retrieval
schema.word_count: Approximate word count of the text field
schema.text: Cleaned, chunk-level text ready for embedding
